report.summary: Cycle-close: All 5 critical pages healthy in production. 4/5 API endpoints live (market-metrics 404 — exists locally but not deployed). Git locks Day 10, 816 uncommitted files, deploy gap widening. No new commits today.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 5/5 critical pages verified LIVE: homepage, /tools, /learn, /exchanges, /wallets — all returning 200 with correct titles
Homepage title: 'degen0x - Onboarding the Next 1 Billion to Web3' — renders correctly
Tools page shows 104+ tools listed — all tool cards rendering properly
Learn page updated for 2026 — guides and tutorials displaying correctly
Exchanges and Wallets pages show March 2026 data — no stale content detected
No browser errors or JS exceptions observed on any page
TS errors stable at 142 (carry-over from v6 — no regressions)
103 published slugs still missing page.tsx — unchanged carry-over
17 duplicate slug entries in published-pages.ts — cleanup still pending

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 4/5 production API endpoints healthy: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-dominance all returning fresh JSON
/api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally but is part of 816 uncommitted files not yet deployed
Fear & Greed Index: value 14 (Extreme Fear) — data fresh as of 2026-03-25T05:54:10Z with 30-day history
Market Dominance: BTC 56.36%, ETH 10.35%, 18,023 active cryptocurrencies — data fresh
Prices and Trending endpoints returning complete data with sparklines and rankings
Cache TTLs unchanged: prices (swr:120s), trending (swr:600s), fear-greed (swr:1200s), market-dominance (swr:600s)
Rate limiter still only on cache-stats and health routes — 0/6 core data routes covered (carry-over P1)
CoinGecko free tier risk persists — no API key configured

sections.title: DevOps
items: CRITICAL: Git lock files persist — .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16) — DAY 10 of blocker
816 uncommitted files (up from 807 in v6 — 9 new files since last cycle)
Last deployed commit: e999560 (Mar 17) — 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'
Deploy gap: ~170+ pages built locally but not live — Day 8 since last push, gap continues to grow
No new commits today — all work blocked behind git locks
Production site stable on last deploy — no error spikes or performance regressions observed
REQUIRES JEFE ACTION: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: No new work landed — cycle was steady-state monitoring
Delta from v6: uncommitted files grew 807→816 (9 new files from recent scaffolding work)
CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) Git locks Day 10, (2) 816 files need commit+deploy, (3) rate limiter gap on core APIs
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items ready (governance-security-attack-vectors, funding-rate-arbitrage-guide) pending deploy
523 total published page entries (519 slugs, 502 unique) — same as v6
ATTENTION NEEDED: The deploy gap is the #1 risk — every cycle without deployment increases the blast radius of the eventual push
